current.creator: Bob Dylan
current.title: Stuck Inside of Mobile with the Memphis Blues Again
current.quote:
It all seems so well timed

An’ here I sit so patiently

Waiting to find out what price

You have to pay to get out of

Going through all these things twice
current.reference: Bob Dylan, “Stuck Inside of Mobile with the Memphis Blues Again,” 1966. Written by Bob Dylan.

note: This file is intentionally a single replaceable current entry. To change the wisdom box, replace current rather than adding to an array.
